slot6.lore: The storm of summer. Thunder rolls with its cry, and lightning strikes in time with its wings. The skies darken as it passes, and violent storms follow its soar.

slot3.lore: The cold of winter. Air chills and frost gathers in its wake. Snowfall follows as it passes, and mountains are left sealed in ice where it lingers.

slot4.lore: The embodiment of wishing, awakening only once in a thousand years. In those brief moments, it listens to the desires carried in the hearts of others, and its power brings those wishes into reality.

hiddenAbility.nerf: When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
When slotted as a non-hidden ability: Speed reduced to x1.5
